_comment: WAI-illustrious-SDXL v17.0 txt2img — formato API de ComfyUI. Defaults probados para Illustrious (1024x1024, 28 steps, CFG 5, euler_ancestral/normal). Usar tal cual con la API nativa POST /prompt, o dentro del envelope del API Wrapper: {"input":{"workflow_json": <esto>, "return_outputs_as_base64": true}}. Para el wrapper, dejar seed como "__RANDOM_INT__".

inputs.text: 1girl, solo, masterpiece, best quality, amazing quality, very aesthetic
lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, text, error, missing fingers, extra digit, fewer digits, cropped, worst quality, low quality, jpeg artifacts, signature, watermark, username, blurry
